CrewLeaderboard.js has only 1 data-testid (crew-card-{hash}). Should add data-testid to: tabs (my-crews, leaderboard, badges), metric filter buttons, badge cards
CrewLeaderboard component supports 3 variants: 'full', 'compact', 'profile' - all implemented correctly
Backend models CrewStats, CrewBadge, UserCrewStats exist in models.py (lines 2535-2632)
Backend routes registered in routes/__init__.py line 51 and 114
All 4 backend endpoints working: GET /api/crew/leaderboard, GET /api/users/{id}/crew-summary, PUT /api/crew/{hash}/settings, POST /api/crew/update-stats
